---
description: Show all files changed since the last commit in this project
---

Show all files changed in the current project since the last commit.

Use the `get_changed_files` tool to retrieve the diff, then present the results as a clear summary organized by category:

- **New files** — files that were added
- **Modified files** — files that were changed
- **Deleted files** — files that were removed

For each file include the relative path and a one-line description of what changed (inferred from the diff). Keep the output concise.
